description: Composition Blue wide neck printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has cap sleeves, three buttoned placket to one side with cord tie at neckline, line of sequins below yoke at front with gored panels flaring out to the hem on front and back, red piping edging the panels, shiny broad panel at hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This printed kurta from biba has a great flared shape created by panels running vertically down the top making this a figure flattering choice – remember that vertical lines will draw the eye up and down making you look taller. The colours look great together and the sequins and bow make this top into a party wear winner. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
